title: interview.feedback.submitted payload (v1)
description: Interview feedback submitted. Shape follows the typed FeedbackSubmittedPayloadSchema in packages/contracts. HONEST STATUS: notification-service subscribes to tenant.*.interview.feedback.submitted, but NO producer publishes this subject today — apps/interview-service/src/routes/interviews.ts persists InterviewFeedback and may auto-advance the round, but does not call publishEvent for feedback. This schema documents the CONTRACT the existing consumer expects; the leaf is `feedback.submitted` (domain=interview).
x-producer: (none active — consumer-only contract; interview-service does not publish it today)
x-consumers: notification-service (INTERVIEW_FEEDBACK_NEW tenant broadcast; audit + webhook fan-out)

recommendation.description: Interview recommendation (InterviewRecommendation enum, e.g. STRONG_HIRE / HIRE / NO_HIRE / STRONG_NO_HIRE).
